description_long: This is a tall, cylindrical beverage can with a metallic finish, featuring a prominent Red Bull logo in red and gold on a pale yellow and white background. The can displays a stylized bull graphic and the words 'FAST MAN LEAGUE' in bold, black and gold lettering, accompanied by a wolf head illustration. Along one side, there is a vertical measurement scale, possibly for tracking consumption or as a design element, and a series of small, colorful icons or mascots arranged in a grid. The top of the can is black with a standard pull-tab opening, and the overall design is energetic and sporty, suggesting a promotional or themed edition. The surface is glossy and smooth, reflecting light and emphasizing the vibrant branding. No visible nutritional information or flavor indication is present, but the can's design is clearly intended to attract attention in an urban environment.
description: A tall, metallic Red Bull can with bold branding, a wolf and bull graphic, and colorful icons on a glossy, pale background. The can features a measurement scale and sporty promotional elements.
description_view_0: Front view showing the Red Bull logo, colorful icons, and part of the bull and wolf graphics on a pale background.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the vertical measurement scale and a column of colorful icons, with less visible branding.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a partial bull graphic and abstract shapes, with minimal text or branding.
description_view_3: Angled view featuring the Red Bull logo, 'FAST MAN LEAGUE' text, and the wolf head graphic prominently.
attribute_brand_logo: Red Bull logo, located on the front and side, featuring two red bulls charging at a yellow sun, with 'Red Bull' text in red.
attribute_promotional_graphics: FAST MAN LEAGUE logo with a wolf head, colorful icons/mascots, and a measurement scale, all on the can's exterior.
